[
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_POS_001",
    "title": "MN Initiated Secondary Node Release - Successful Release Confirmed by SN",
    "description": "Verify that the MN can successfully initiate a Secondary Node (SN) Release procedure and the SN confirms the release.",
    "preconditions": [
      "MN and SN are connected and UE is in EN-DC mode",
      "No SN change procedure is triggered by SN"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "MN sends SgNB Release Request message to SN with data forwarding addresses if applicable",
      "SN receives the request and sends SgNB Release Request Acknowledge confirming SN Release",
      "MN sends RRCConnectionReconfiguration message to UE indicating release of entire SCG configuration",
      "UE applies configuration successfully",
      "SN sends SN Status Transfer message for bearers using RLC AM",
      "SN starts data forwarding to MN",
      "SN sends Secondary RAT Data Usage Report message to MN",
      "MN initiates path update procedure if applicable",
      "SN releases radio and control-plane resources upon UE Context Release message"
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "SgNB Release Request Acknowledge is received confirming the release",
      "UE successfully releases SCG configuration without failure",
      "SN Status Transfer message is received and processed",
      "Data forwarding starts without interruption",
      "Secondary RAT Data Usage Report is received with correct data volumes",
      "Path update procedure is initiated if required",
      "SN releases resources properly after UE Context Release"
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Monitor signalling messages between MN and SN for correct messages and acknowledgements",
      "Check UE logs for successful SCG configuration release",
      "Verify SN Status Transfer and Secondary RAT Data Usage Report messages received by MN",
      "Check data forwarding status and continuity",
      "Confirm resource release on SN after UE Context Release"
    ]
  },

      "Check SN resource release post UE Context Release"

    ],
